audit.summary: Faithful extraction. All 8 sections present on live are reproduced with correct titles, highlights, bodies, images and CTAs. Section 5 (pêche aux informations) is structured slightly differently on live (full-width feature with mockup) but content/image are correctly captured under feature-split.
